title: Pedestal of the Master Sword - The Legend of Zelda
description: Pedestal of the Master Sword brings the iconic moment from The Legend of Zelda into Minecraft. Discover a sacred pedestal hidden in the Minecraft world, pull the legendary Master Sword, and claim the blade chosen by the hero.

# 🗿 Pedestal of the Master Sword

Bring the legend of the Master Sword from The Legend of Zelda into your Minecraft world.

This mod adds a naturally generating legendary sword pedestal structure, powered by datapack-based world generation and packaged as a Fabric mod. While exploring your world, you may stumble upon a mysterious shrine holding a legendary blade.

### ✨ Features
- World generation Pedestal structure
- Master Sword
- Lightweight & vanilla-friendly

## 🔍 Locate the Structure (Command)
If you want to find the structure directly, use:
> /locate structure gee:master_sword_pedestal

## 🔗 Compatibility
This mod is designed to be vanilla-friendly and datapack-based, making it compatible with most world generation mods.
